psychology.jtbd_primary: Finir mon 8-9h shift customer-facing sans grimacer derrière mon smile · sans rentrer en limpant à la maison · sans claquer 25% de mon tip cash dans une insole qui marche pas
psychology.$comment_jtbd_primary_override: Override mère · ajoute dimension emotional 'smile-despite-pain' (customer-facing constraint unique) + dimension price-sensitive ('25% de mon tip cash dans insole'). Drive un copy angle different · authenticity 'we get it · $27 from your tips is real money'.
psychology.jtbd_secondary: Stay in service industry sans damage chronique · transition out career si possible mais pas forced par foot/back injury
drives: pain relief permettant maintenir smile customer-facing (job depends on demeanor)
fast results (latency tolerance basse · si pas ressenti vite, return)
fears: claquer $27 dans énième insole qui marche pas (déjà testé Dr. Scholl déçu)
missing shifts cost (tipped workers = pas de sick days souvent · revenu direct lié shift)

decision_process.trigger: Specific moment · post-double-shift dimanche soir exhaustion + douleur talon refusing weekend activities OR tip-jar count Vendredi soir + flash 'this month I deserve to fix my feet' OR collègue serveuse mention insole break room
decision_process.$comment_trigger_override: Override mère · ajoute tip-jar trigger spécifique service industry (cash moment decision · $27 immédiat affordable depuis tip cash). Drive timing creative paid = Vendredi-Dimanche soir.
evaluation_criteria: fits fashion-acceptable shoes (Skechers Slip-Ins · Reebok Classic · Vans · Doc Martens · Adidas Stan Smith · constraint fashion-allowed shop floor)
endorsement peer-trusted (review serveuse-by-serveuse > podiatrist clinical pour cette sous-poche)
money-back risk-free 90 days · CRITICAL (downside-removal cash-flow context)
price $27 single trial · pas $48 bundle direct (price-sensitive entry)
purchase_path: Search Google 'best insole serving 8 hours' OR 'plantar fasciitis cheap insole'
Compare 2-3 options DTC focus price + return policy
Read TikTok comments + Amazon reviews specifically service industry verbatims
Purchase 1 single pair trial $27 (entry-level · pas direct bundle)
decision_process.time_to_decide: 2-7 days research · plus court que mère · cash-flow decision moment-driven

market_position.$comment_segment_size: Estimation 9% acquisition Stepprs · moitié de nurses/warehouse car price-sensitive ralentit conversion · mais volume audience plus large · ratio plus bas mais reach plus haut. Split workers-shifts ≈ 18% nurses + 18% warehouse + 9% hospitality.

competition_alternatives: Dr. Scholl Massaging Gel Sport (drugstore $15-20 · 'cheap réflexe' · entry generic)
No insole + Skechers + Reebok comfort shoe alone (resigned · 'shoes are enough')
market_position.differentiation_appeal: Engineered insole entry-tier $27 + 90-day money-back annule risk (cash-flow context downside-removal essential) · fits fashion shoes (Skechers · Reebok · Vans · Doc Martens · pas constraint steel-toe) · 800k+ customers proof scale · authentic service-industry verbatims (Rachel S roller testimonial drive)
